Source   Edit  

Data/Commands Layer

Imports

lowlevel

Types

GController = ref object
Handles the JSON associated with commands Source   Edit   
GNetDevice = object
  macAddr*: string
  ipAddr*: string
  sku*: string
Basically just data holder Source   Edit  

Procs

proc `$`(d: GNetDevice): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc brightness(ctrl: GController; d: GNetDevice; val: int) {....raises: [OSError],
    tags: [WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc color(ctrl: GController; d: GNetDevice; r, g, b: int) {....raises: [OSError],
    tags: [WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Same as color using colorwc command, but color is ignored by Govee when temp is set. Govee wants an integer bound(2000, 9000) representing kelvin. Source   Edit   
proc discover(ctrl: GController; skuModel: string = ""; timeout_ms: int = 5000): seq[
    GNetDevice] {....raises: [OSError, Exception, IOError, ValueError,
                           JsonParsingError, KeyError],
                  tags: [WriteIOEffect, TimeEffect, ReadIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc newGController(localIp: string = ""): GController {....raises: [OSError,
    SslError, ValueError, Exception, LibraryError, AddressInUseError],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect, RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc newGController(transport: GNetClient): GController {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc status(ctrl: GController; d: GNetDevice; timeout_ms: int = 500): JsonNode {....raises: [
    OSError, IOError, Exception, ValueError, ProtocolError, JsonParsingError],
    tags: [WriteIOEffect, ReadIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc temperature(ctrl: GController; d: GNetDevice; val: int) {.
    ...raises: [OSError], tags: [WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Same as color using colorwc command, but color is ignored by Govee when temp is set. Govee wants an integer bound(2000, 9000) representing kelvin. Source   Edit   
proc turn(ctrl: GController; d: GNetDevice; on: bool) {....raises: [OSError],
    tags: [WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit  

Exports

AddressInUseError, ProtocolError
